message:
audit: batch 475 — diagnostics.rs + ir.rs + postgres spot check, all SOUND

diagnostics.rs (2762L): Tarjan SCC textbook-correct, trapped-cycle sound.
ir.rs (3477L): pure declarative IR, thorough validation, no runtime mutation.
postgres.rs: spot-checked read_message (64MiB DoS cap) and parse_data_row
(negative/mismatch checks). Sound.

3 agent audits still in progress (~15K lines: consumer.rs, redis.rs+stream.rs,
browser_stream.rs+wasm_abi.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
